title: Default
objective: Start the default workstream for Meeting Ingest.
status_summary: Started Layer 5B with deterministic eligible-input fingerprinting, schema 1.0/1.1 source normalization, explicit playbook update, immutable generations, canonical profile and briefing artifacts, append-only successful derivation commits, and an atomic current index. Added commit-order, fingerprint stability, legacy mapping, failure-boundary, configured-path, and CLI tests; 187 tests pass.
open_questions: Should doctor distinguish advisory issues from failures so low_confidence_meeting_date does not force exit 1?
What are the true occurrence dates for the nitesh follow-up, wide-orbit orchestration, fable-5 workflow review, and HTV artifacts?
next_actions: Complete Layer 5B aggregation and review overlays; add failure ledger records, status/doctor freshness diagnostics, index repair, playbook show, and concise brief.
continuation_hint: Next: Complete Layer 5B aggregation and review overlays; add failure ledger records, status/doctor freshness diagnostics, index repair, playbook show, and concise brief.
